title: autobench.budget.gauge v1
description: Periodic budget telemetry emitted once per generation per active run. Provides a live view of request consumption and estimated remaining runway without triggering warning thresholds. Source: /autobench.

generation.description: Current generation number at time of emission.

requests_used.description: Cumulative LLM requests issued by this run so far (MiniMax billing unit is requests).

max_requests.description: Configured maximum request budget for this run (the gauge only emits when a cap is set).

estimated_remaining_generations.description: Estimated generations remaining at the current request burn rate.
